[Table:  Family Reunification (more than 90 days, Residency Permit)]
Please note: the Visa Fees will need to be paid at the Visa Application Centre in Cash/Debit/Credit Payment in PHP only Depend on exchange rate.
- Aside from the visa fee, VFS will collect a service fee of PHP 865.00 and PHP 1,397.00 in VFS Manila and VFS Cebu respectively, for each visa application.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
The applications are sent to and assessed by the Embassy of Hungary in Manila and transmitted to the Hungarian Immigration, if all documents are in order and complete. The processing time for short-term Schengen visa application is 15 calendar days from the date of arrival at the Embassy (not from the date the visa application was submitted at the Visa application Centre). This period may be extended up to 45 calendar days in certain cases, particularly where additional examination of the original application is required.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
The applications are sent to and assessed by the Embassy of Hungary in Manila and transmitted to the Hungarian Immigration, if all documents are in order and complete. The processing time for short-term Schengen visa application is 15 calendar days from the date of arrival at the Embassy (not from the date the visa application was submitted at the Visa application Centre). This period may be extended up to 45 calendar days in certain cases, particularly where additional examination of the original application is required.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Family Reunification (more than 90 days, Residency Permit)]
Please note: the Visa Fees will need to be paid at the Visa Application Centre in Cash/Debit/Credit Payment in PHP only Depend on exchange rate.
- Aside from the visa fee, VFS will collect a service fee of PHP 865.00 and PHP 1,397.00 in VFS Manila and VFS Cebu respectively, for each visa application.
- Once you paid the visa fee NO REFUND is possible except if we provided wrong payment instruction. Please note that in case of withdrawal or refusal the fee will NOT be reimbursed!

## Documents Required
General checklist for all residency permit applications
- application form duly filled and signed in English or Hungarian (https://oif.gov.hu/storage/media/Formanyomtatv%C3%A1nyok/A%2043%202024%20BM%20rendelet%20szerinti%20%C3%BAjak/9_EN.DOCX (https://oif.gov.hu/storage/media/Formanyomtatv%C3%A1nyok/A%2043%202024%20BM%20rendelet%20szerinti%20%C3%BAjak/9_EN.DOCX)) Special rules apply for minors;
- passport with at least 18 months validity. Please note that the validity of the residency permit cannot be longer than 3 months before the expiry of your passport. It should be machine-readable, contain at least two blank pages and should not be older than 10 years;
- one recent passport-size photo. Please note that the photos have to be color and all facial details are clearly visible, including ears. Glasses, masks, hats are not allowed.
- residence permit handling fee to be paid at the VFS;
- please note if your application requires the authentication of Power of Attorney or translation you have to make a separate appointment with the Consulate by email (consulate.mnl@mfa.gov.hu (mailto:consulate.mnl@mfa.gov.hu)) and pay a separate fee BEFORE you go to VFS. You will have to submit the original Power of Attorney and one copy to the VFS. You will get the original back once the VFS officer checks it against the copy;
- specific supporting documents according to the purpose of travel (see the following section);
- duly signed authorization if you would like to allow us to communicate with your Hungarian and/or local company/lawyer or family member.

- Study
- certificate of admission to the educational institute, including confirmation of completed payment of tuition and other fees (or tuition fee waiver);
- certification of award (in case of scholarship);
- proof of the applicant’s qualifications (diplomas, certificates) with Apostille authentication (to be obtained from Department of Foreign Affairs of the Philippines, Authentication Division);
- proof of language skills;
- resume;
- proof of sufficient resources to cover means of subsistence in Hungary (own or family member’s income or assets for tuition fee, accommodation, return travel, healthcare). According to Hungarian law, only parents can provide financial assistance for studies (valid birth certificate to be presented). The Immigration Office will not accept assistance from uncles, nieces, friends, colleagues and non-eligible family members. In case of company or educational institute providing for finance, a valid study contract has to be submitted. Documents can be:
- a certificate on the payment of scholarship grant,
- funds held on bank accounts, etc.
- In case of affidavit of support or contract, proof of ability to provide support shall be enclosed (6 months bank history, employer’s certificate with position and salary);
- proof of accommodation (ie. lease agreement, or dormitory acceptance letter, etc.);
- proof of health care (provided by the school or insurance company);
- sufficient funds to finance a two-way flight.
- for Stipendium Hungaricum ( www.stipendiumhungaricum.hu (http://www.stipendiumhungaricum.hu/) ) students visa, tuition, insurance fee is waived, support for accommodation and daily living is provided, amount of needed own funds can be much less. However, the VFS service fee is still applicable.
Further details and the application form: https://oif.gov.hu/factsheets/residence-of-the-student-pupil (https://oif.gov.hu/factsheets/residence-of-the-student-pupil)

## Photo Specifications
A Photograph submitted with the application for a visa should comply with the following specifications:

- Must be an up-to-date photograph (less than 6 months old)
- Must be a color photograph printed on normal photographic paper
- Should be passport sized 3.5 x 4.5 cm
- Close up to your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70-80% of the photograph
- Full face taken straight forward 30 - 36 mm from point of the chin to head of hair
- Taken against a light background
- Without sunglasses
- Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons
- Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses
- The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes
- The mouth must be closed
- If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements, the visa application will be considered incomplete, and applicant will be asked to submit new photographs.

## Processing Time
General processing time is 15 days from the day when all the requested documents are submitted. This period may be extended up to a maximum of 30 or exceptionally 60 calendar days in individual cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed.

## Download Forms
Visa application form can be downloaded and printed from the link below. Forms are also available at the Visa Application Centre free of charge.
Visa Application Form  (https://oif.gov.hu/)(English)

visa_types.name: Tourism (short term/Schengen)
visa_types.documents_required:
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/phl/en/hun/travel-insurance).
The original, as well as the copy of those documents which the applicant requests back, shall be submitted.
 Checklist
visa_types.visa_fees:
Visa fee is Php 6,237.00 pesos (Schengen C Adult) and Php 3,119.00 pesos (Schengen C 6-11 Y/O) in 2026, paid in cash/debit or credit card in VFS upon submission of document. Once you paid the visa fee NO REFUND is possible except if we provided wrong payment instruction. Please note that in case of withdrawal or refusal the fee will NOT be reimbursed!
Aside from the visa fee, VFS will collect a service fee of PHP 865.00 and PHP 1,397.00 in VFS Manila and VFS Cebu respectively, for each visa application. VFS accepts payment in cash/debit or credit card at the Hungary counter in VFS during your appointment date.
Free visa
- researchers having a valid contract with a research institution in Hungary,
- nationals of countries having a visa free agreement with the European Union
- children under the age of 6,
- family members of EU/EEA citizens either travelling together with or to meet their EU/EEA national family members (national marriage or birth certificate is required from the given EU/EEA country)
As of 2019 January 1, family members of Hungarian citizens are no longer eligible for free visa!
- A
 
reduced fee
 applies to the following applicants:
- nationals of countries having an agreement with the European Union,
- children between the age of 6 and 11 years.
visa_types.processing_time:
General processing time is 15 days from the day  when all the requested documents are submitted. This period may be extended up to a maximum of 30 or
                              exceptionally 60 calendar days in individual cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
When you apply for a visa, the application will be forwarded to the Embassy of Hungary in Manila for processing. All cases are considered individually to see if the conditions for granting
                              a visa are fulfilled.
This visa is solely for the purpose of leisure travel including vacationing, cruising, sightseeing and other recreational activities. If during any portion of their visit to Hungary the
                              applicant intends to engage in business, or official duties he/she must refer to other relevant visa categories.
You will need to submit a copy of a travel medical insurance policy that will cover any costs of repatriation on medical grounds, urgent medical care or emergency hospital treatment.
                              The insurance may be bought from an insurance company in the accredited list of local insurance companies, or an insurance company with office within the Schengen area. The insurance
                              must be valid for the entire Schengen area, and cover the duration of your stay. The minimum coverage shall be EUR 30.000. For the list of accredited travel insurance, click here
The possession of a visa does not give you an automatic right of entry to a Schengen country.
When you cross the border into the Schengen area, you will have to present: 
- your passport with the visa sticker
- proof that you have enough money to support yourself during your stay (e.g. cash or a credit card). If you have a guarantee form, you should also bring a copy of this with you.
- documentation showing the purpose of your visit, such as an invitation, hotel reservation, etc.
- a return or round trip ticket if you are visiting the Schengen area for tourist purposes or private reasons
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
When you apply for a visa, the application will be forwarded to the Embassy of Hungary in Manila for processing. All cases are considered individually to see if the conditions for granting
                              a visa are fulfilled.
This visa is solely for the purpose of leisure travel including vacationing, cruising, sightseeing and other recreational activities. If during any portion of their visit to Hungary the
                              applicant intends to engage in business, or official duties he/she must refer to other relevant visa categories.
You will need to submit a copy of a travel medical insurance policy that will cover any costs of repatriation on medical grounds, urgent medical care or emergency hospital treatment.
                              The insurance may be bought from an insurance company in the accredited list of local insurance companies, or an insurance company with office within the Schengen area. The insurance
                              must be valid for the entire Schengen area, and cover the duration of your stay. The minimum coverage shall be EUR 30.000. For the list of accredited travel insurance, click here
The possession of a visa does not give you an automatic right of entry to a Schengen country.
When you cross the border into the Schengen area, you will have to present: 
- your passport with the visa sticker
- proof that you have enough money to support yourself during your stay (e.g. cash or a credit card). If you have a guarantee form, you should also bring a copy of this with you.
- documentation showing the purpose of your visit, such as an invitation, hotel reservation, etc.
- a return or round trip ticket if you are visiting the Schengen area for tourist purposes or private reasons

## Visa Fees
Visa fee is Php 6,237.00 pesos (Schengen C Adult) and Php 3,119.00 pesos (Schengen C 6-11 Y/O) in 2026, paid in cash/debit or credit card in VFS upon submission of document. Once you paid the visa fee NO REFUND is possible except if we provided wrong payment instruction. Please note that in case of withdrawal or refusal the fee will NOT be reimbursed!
Aside from the visa fee, VFS will collect a service fee of PHP 865.00 and PHP 1,397.00 in VFS Manila and VFS Cebu respectively, for each visa application. VFS accepts payment in cash/debit or credit card at the Hungary counter in VFS during your appointment date.
Free visa
- researchers having a valid contract with a research institution in Hungary,
- nationals of countries having a visa free agreement with the European Union
- children under the age of 6,
- family members of EU/EEA citizens either travelling together with or to meet their EU/EEA national family members (national marriage or birth certificate is required from the given EU/EEA country)
As of 2019 January 1, family members of Hungarian citizens are no longer eligible for free visa!
- A
 
reduced fee
 applies to the following applicants:
- nationals of countries having an agreement with the European Union,
- children between the age of 6 and 11 years.

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/phl/en/hun/travel-insurance).
The original, as well as the copy of those documents which the applicant requests back, shall be submitted.
 Checklist

## Photo Specifications
Applicants, submit your Application form with the new photo format, as explained below:
General 
- The photo must fulfill the norm specified by the ICAO (International Civil Aviation Organization).
- Use coloured photo with plain white background.
- The photo must be no more than 6-months old (not used in any visas).
- Not tilted picture (portrait style) showing both edges of face clearly (hair behind ears).
- Close up of the head and top of the shoulders so that the face takes up 70–80% of the photograph.
- Photo in sharp focus and clear.
Attaching the Photo to the Application form 
- Glue one photograph on the designated space of the application form.

## Processing Time
General processing time is 15 days from the day  when all the requested documents are submitted. This period may be extended up to a maximum of 30 or
                              exceptionally 60 calendar days in individual cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed.

## Download Forms
Schengen Application Form

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
The applications are sent to and assessed by the Embassy of Hungary in Manila and transmitted to the Hungarian Immigration, if all documents are in order and complete. The processing time for short-term Schengen visa application is 15 calendar days from the date of arrival at the Embassy (not from the date the visa application was submitted at the Visa application Centre). This period may be extended up to 45 calendar days in certain cases, particularly where additional examination of the original application is required.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Family Reunification (more than 90 days, Residency Permit)]
Please note: the Visa Fees will need to be paid at the Visa Application Centre in Cash/Debit/Credit Payment in PHP only Depend on exchange rate.
- Aside from the visa fee, VFS will collect a service fee of PHP 865.00 and PHP 1,397.00 in VFS Manila and VFS Cebu respectively, for each visa application.
- Once you paid the visa fee NO REFUND is possible except if we provided wrong payment instruction. Please note that in case of withdrawal or refusal the fee will NOT be reimbursed!

## Documents Required
General checklist for all residency permit applications
- application form duly filled and signed in English or Hungarian (https://oif.gov.hu/storage/media/Formanyomtatv%C3%A1nyok/A%2043%202024%20BM%20rendelet%20szerinti%20%C3%BAjak/9_EN.DOCX (https://oif.gov.hu/storage/media/Formanyomtatv%C3%A1nyok/A%2043%202024%20BM%20rendelet%20szerinti%20%C3%BAjak/9_EN.DOCX)) Special rules apply for minors;
- passport with at least 18 months validity. Please note that the validity of the residency permit cannot be longer than 3 months before the expiry of your passport. It should be machine-readable, contain at least two blank pages and should not be older than 10 years;
- one recent passport-size photo. Please note that the photos have to be color and all facial details are clearly visible, including ears. Glasses, masks, hats are not allowed.
- residence permit handling fee to be paid at the VFS;
- please note if your application requires the authentication of Power of Attorney or translation you have to make a separate appointment with the Consulate by email (consulate.mnl@mfa.gov.hu (mailto:consulate.mnl@mfa.gov.hu)) and pay a separate fee BEFORE you go to VFS. You will have to submit the original Power of Attorney and one copy to the VFS. You will get the original back once the VFS officer checks it against the copy;
- specific supporting documents according to the purpose of travel (see the following section);
- duly signed authorization if you would like to allow us to communicate with your Hungarian and/or local company/lawyer or family member.

- Family reunion
- The Immigration of Hungary will examine if the partners involved are misusing of the right to family reunification such as marriages contracted for the purpose to acquire right to residency (marriage of convenience, registered partnership of convenience), fake adoption or declaration of fathership to convey nationality and a right of residence on the child and its mother, knowing that he is not its father and not willing to assume parental responsibilities. In this regard the Consulate and the Immigration of Hungary reserve the right to conduct an interview at the Consulate after the submission of the application to clarify the situation.Checklist:
- Hungarian birth/marriage/adoption certificate for family member of a Hungarian citizen;
- national birth/marriage/adoption certificate if the family member residing in Hungary is not Hungarian;
- in case of foreigner national family member with the right of residence in Hungary: copy of the residence permit;
- proof of means of subsistence in Hungary, to substantiate that the lawful income or assets can cover the living expenses of the family, including accommodation, daily living, return travel; Documents can be:
- a notarized statement made by the family member providing support to the applicant;
- proof of the family member’s ability to provide such support (6 months bank history, employers certificate with salary, latest income certificate issued by the tax authority for the family member and/or for the applicant);
- proof of Hungarian accommodation:
- a notarized or two witness statement by the owner of the accommodation or;
- proof of ownership with the excerpt from the real estate registry (minimum 6 square meters of living space per person) or a commercial or other accommodation, lease contract, courtesy accommodation;
- a real estate sales contract and a copy of the decision of the competent Budapest or county government agency granting permission for the acquisition of a real estate property;
- proof of comprehensive health insurance: with the social security system or with private insurance company or a declaration and sufficient funds to finance it;
- Further details:
- https://oif.gov.hu/factsheets/residence-permit-for-the-purpose-of-family-reunification (https://oif.gov.hu/factsheets/residence-permit-for-the-purpose-of-family-reunification)
- If you wish to extend your residency permit you can only do that in Hungary at the nearest Immigration Office. If your permit is expired and you are in the Philippines, you need to apply for a new permit by initiating a new application procedure at the VFS.
- If your purpose of residence is other than the ones mentioned above, please send us an email to consulate.mnl@mfa.gov.hu (mailto:consulate.mnl@mfa.gov.hu) so we can advise you. Please be as specific as possible.
- Please be advised that individual circumstances can vary to a large extend, so the Consulate or the Immigration Office reserves the right to request further documents to be submitted or to conduct an interview at the Consulate after the submission of the application to clarify the situation.
- PLEASE BEAR IN MIND THAT BECAUSE OF THE THREAT OF ILLEGAL MIGRATION AND TRAFFICKING OF PERSONS, ALL AUTHORITIES DURING THE VISA PROCEDURE ARE CLOSELY OBSERVING AND MONITORING WHETHER THE EMPLOYMENT, STUDY OR THE FAMILY RELATIONSHIP HAS BEEN ESTABILISHED ONLY TO OBTAIN A RESIDENCY PERMIT. IN CASE OF ABUSE OR FRAUD THE APPLICATION WILL BE REFUSED AND CRIMINAL AND/OR IMMIGRATION SANCTIONS WILL BE APPLIED.

## Photo Specifications
A Photograph submitted with the application for a visa should comply with the following specifications:

- Must be an up-to-date photograph (less than 6 months old)
- Must be a color photograph printed on normal photographic paper
- Should be passport sized 3.5 x 4.5 cm
- Close up to your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70-80% of the photograph
- Full face taken straight forward 30 - 36 mm from point of the chin to head of hair
- Taken against a light background
- Without sunglasses
- Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons
- Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses
- The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes
- The mouth must be closed
- If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements, the visa application will be considered incomplete, and applicant will be asked to submit new photographs.

## Processing Time
General processing time is 15 days from the day when all the requested documents are submitted. This period may be extended up to a maximum of 30 or exceptionally 60 calendar days in individual cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed.

## Download Forms
Visa application form can be downloaded and printed from the link below. Forms are also available at the Visa Application Centre free of charge.
Visa Application Form  (https://oif.gov.hu/)(English)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
The applications are sent to and assessed by the Embassy of Hungary in Manila and transmitted to the Hungarian Immigration, if all documents are in order and complete. The processing time for short-term Schengen visa application is 15 calendar days from the date of arrival at the Embassy (not from the date the visa application was submitted at the Visa application Centre). This period may be extended up to 45 calendar days in certain cases, particularly where additional examination of the original application is required.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
The applications are sent to and assessed by the Embassy of Hungary in Manila and transmitted to the Hungarian Immigration, if all documents are in order and complete. The processing time for short-term Schengen visa application is 15 calendar days from the date of arrival at the Embassy (not from the date the visa application was submitted at the Visa application Centre). This period may be extended up to 45 calendar days in certain cases, particularly where additional examination of the original application is required.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Work (more than 90 days, Residency Permit)]
Please note: the Visa Fees will need to be paid at the Visa Application Centre in Cash/Debit/Credit Payment in PHP only Depend on exchange rate.
- Aside from the visa fee, VFS will collect a service fee of PHP 865.00 and PHP 1,397.00 in VFS Manila and VFS Cebu respectively, for each visa application.
- Once you paid the visa fee NO REFUND is possible except if we provided wrong payment instruction. Please note that in case of withdrawal or refusal the fee will NOT be reimbursed!

## Documents Required
General checklist for all residency permit applications
- application form duly filled and signed in English or Hungarian (https://oif.gov.hu/storage/media/Formanyomtatv%C3%A1nyok/A%2043%202024%20BM%20rendelet%20szerinti%20%C3%BAjak/9_EN.DOCX (https://oif.gov.hu/storage/media/Formanyomtatv%C3%A1nyok/A%2043%202024%20BM%20rendelet%20szerinti%20%C3%BAjak/9_EN.DOCX)) Special rules apply for minors;
- passport with at least 18 months validity. Please note that the validity of the residency permit cannot be longer than 3 months before the expiry of your passport. It should be machine-readable, contain at least two blank pages and should not be older than 10 years;
- one recent passport-size photo. Please note that the photos have to be color and all facial details are clearly visible, including ears. Glasses, masks, hats are not allowed.
- residence permit handling fee to be paid at the VFS;
- please note if your application requires the authentication of Power of Attorney or translation you have to make a separate appointment with the Consulate by email (consulate.mnl@mfa.gov.hu (mailto:consulate.mnl@mfa.gov.hu)) and pay a separate fee BEFORE you go to VFS. You will have to submit the original Power of Attorney and one copy to the VFS. You will get the original back once the VFS officer checks it against the copy;
- specific supporting documents according to the purpose of travel (see the following section);
- duly signed authorization if you would like to allow us to communicate with your Hungarian and/or local company/lawyer or family member.
Documents checklist for the main residency types
1.	Work/employment
- signed preliminary work contract indicating at least company name, name and signature of the duly authorized representative of the company, employee name and signature and personal data, duration of contract, position, salary, place of work (“előzetes megállapodás”);
- employer’s declaration on the benefits provided to the employee, if any (ie. accommodation, meal, plane ticket, travel in Hungary, provision for subsistence for the first month, etc.);
- proof of accommodation (excerpt from the land registry, owner’s agreement, contract of lease, hotel booking);
- valid certificate of permission to employ a foreigner (igazolás munkaerőigény bejelentéséről) or proof of exemption to obtain the “igazolás”;
- details of the contact person at the employer (name, position, e-mail, telephone);
- details of the contact person at the Philippine and the Hungarian manpower agency, if any;
- proof of the applicant ’s qualifications (diplomas, trainings, certificates from previous employers), language skills, similar job experience(s);
- resume.

Further details and the application form: https://oif.gov.hu/factsheets/residence-permit-for-the-purpose-of-employment (https://oif.gov.hu/factsheets/residence-permit-for-the-purpose-of-employment)Please note, that once the applicant has the visa, a DMW/POEA travel clearance has to be obtained from Department of Migrant Workers/Philippines Overseas Employment Administration. Most cases the Philippine authorities require processing the clearance through a licensed agency.

## Photo Specifications
A Photograph submitted with the application for a visa should comply with the following specifications:

- Must be an up-to-date photograph (less than 6 months old)
- Must be a color photograph printed on normal photographic paper
- Should be passport sized 3.5 x 4.5 cm
- Close up to your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70-80% of the photograph
- Full face taken straight forward 30 - 36 mm from point of the chin to head of hair
- Taken against a light background
- Without sunglasses
- Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons
- Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses
- The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes
- The mouth must be closed
- If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements, the visa application will be considered incomplete, and applicant will be asked to submit new photographs.

## Processing Time
General processing time is 15 days from the day when all the requested documents are submitted. This period may be extended up to a maximum of 30 or exceptionally 60 calendar days in individual cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed.

## Download Forms
Visa application form can be downloaded and printed from the link below. Forms are also available at the Visa Application Centre free of charge.
Visa Application Form  (https://oif.gov.hu/)(English)

visa_types.name: Sports (short term/Schengen)
visa_types.documents_required:
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/phl/en/hun/travel-insurance).
The original, as well as the copy of those documents which the applicant requests back, shall be submitted.
Checklist
visa_types.visa_fees:
Visa fee is Php 6,237.00 pesos (Schengen C Adult) and Php 3,119.00 pesos (Schengen C 6-11 Y/O) in 2026, paid in cash/debit or credit card in VFS upon submission of document. Once you paid the visa fee NO REFUND is possible except if we provided wrong payment instruction. Please note that in case of withdrawal or refusal the fee will NOT be reimbursed!
Aside from the visa fee, VFS will collect a service fee of PHP 865.00 and PHP 1,397.00 in VFS Manila and VFS Cebu respectively, for each visa application. VFS accepts payment in cash/debit or credit card at the Hungary counter in VFS during your appointment date.
Free visa
- researchers having a valid contract with a research institution in Hungary,
- nationals of countries having a visa free agreement with the European Union
- children under the age of 6,
- family members of EU/EEA citizens either travelling together with or to meet their EU/EEA national family members (national marriage or birth certificate is required from the given EU/EEA country)
As of 2019 January 1, family members of Hungarian citizens are no longer eligible for free visa!
- A
 
reduced fee
 applies to the following applicants:
- nationals of countries having an agreement with the European Union,
- children between the age of 6 and 11 years.
visa_types.processing_time:
General processing time is 15 days from the day  when all the requested documents are submitted. This period may be extended up to a maximum of 30 or
                              exceptionally 60 calendar days in individual cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed. You will be notified on the decision by e-mail or if any further information
                              is needed.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
When you apply for a visa, the application will be forwarded to the Embassy of Hungary in Manila for processing. All cases are considered individually to see if the conditions for granting
                              a visa are fulfilled.
This visa is solely for the purpose of Sports.
You will need to submit a copy of a travel medical insurance policy that will cover any costs of repatriation on medical grounds, urgent medical care or emergency hospital treatment.
                              The insurance may be bought from an insurance company in the accredited list of local insurance companies, or an insurance company with office within the Schengen area. The insurance
                              must be valid for the entire Schengen area, and cover the duration of your stay. The minimum coverage shall be EUR 30.000. For the list of accredited travel insurance, click here
The possession of a visa does not give you an automatic right of entry to a Schengen country.
When you cross the border into the Schengen area, you will have to present: 
- your passport with the visa sticker
- proof that you have enough money to support yourself during your stay (e.g. cash or a credit card). If you have a guarantee form, you should also bring a copy of this with you.
- documentation showing the purpose of your visit, such as an invitation, hotel reservation, etc.
- a return or round trip ticket if you are visiting the Schengen area for tourist purposes or private reasons
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
When you apply for a visa, the application will be forwarded to the Embassy of Hungary in Manila for processing. All cases are considered individually to see if the conditions for granting
                              a visa are fulfilled.
This visa is solely for the purpose of Sports.
You will need to submit a copy of a travel medical insurance policy that will cover any costs of repatriation on medical grounds, urgent medical care or emergency hospital treatment.
                              The insurance may be bought from an insurance company in the accredited list of local insurance companies, or an insurance company with office within the Schengen area. The insurance
                              must be valid for the entire Schengen area, and cover the duration of your stay. The minimum coverage shall be EUR 30.000. For the list of accredited travel insurance, click here
The possession of a visa does not give you an automatic right of entry to a Schengen country.
When you cross the border into the Schengen area, you will have to present: 
- your passport with the visa sticker
- proof that you have enough money to support yourself during your stay (e.g. cash or a credit card). If you have a guarantee form, you should also bring a copy of this with you.
- documentation showing the purpose of your visit, such as an invitation, hotel reservation, etc.
- a return or round trip ticket if you are visiting the Schengen area for tourist purposes or private reasons

## Visa Fees
Visa fee is Php 6,237.00 pesos (Schengen C Adult) and Php 3,119.00 pesos (Schengen C 6-11 Y/O) in 2026, paid in cash/debit or credit card in VFS upon submission of document. Once you paid the visa fee NO REFUND is possible except if we provided wrong payment instruction. Please note that in case of withdrawal or refusal the fee will NOT be reimbursed!
Aside from the visa fee, VFS will collect a service fee of PHP 865.00 and PHP 1,397.00 in VFS Manila and VFS Cebu respectively, for each visa application. VFS accepts payment in cash/debit or credit card at the Hungary counter in VFS during your appointment date.
Free visa
- researchers having a valid contract with a research institution in Hungary,
- nationals of countries having a visa free agreement with the European Union
- children under the age of 6,
- family members of EU/EEA citizens either travelling together with or to meet their EU/EEA national family members (national marriage or birth certificate is required from the given EU/EEA country)
As of 2019 January 1, family members of Hungarian citizens are no longer eligible for free visa!
- A
 
reduced fee
 applies to the following applicants:
- nationals of countries having an agreement with the European Union,
- children between the age of 6 and 11 years.

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/phl/en/hun/travel-insurance).
The original, as well as the copy of those documents which the applicant requests back, shall be submitted.
Checklist 

## Photo Specifications
Applicants, submit your Application form with the new photo format, as explained below:
General 
- The photo must fulfill the norm specified by the ICAO (International Civil Aviation Organization).
- Use coloured photo with plain white background.
- The photo must be no more than 6-months old (not used in any visas).
- Not tilted picture (portrait style) showing both edges of face clearly (hair behind ears).
- Close up of the head and top of the shoulders so that the face takes up 70–80% of the photograph.
- Photo in sharp focus and clear.
Attaching the Photo to the Application form 
- Glue one photograph on the designated space of the application form.

## Processing Time
General processing time is 15 days from the day  when all the requested documents are submitted. This period may be extended up to a maximum of 30 or
                              exceptionally 60 calendar days in individual cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed. You will be notified on the decision by e-mail or if any further information
                              is needed.

## Download Forms
Schengen Application Form

visa_types.overview:
Overview
When you apply for a visa, the application will be forwarded to the Embassy of Hungary in Manila for processing. All cases are considered individually to see if the conditions for granting
                              a visa are fulfilled.
This visa is solely for the purpose of leisure travel including vacationing, cruising, sightseeing and other recreational activities. If during any portion of their visit to Hungary the
                              applicant intends to engage in business, or official duties he/she must refer to other relevant visa categories.
You will need to submit a copy of a travel medical insurance policy that will cover any costs of repatriation on medical grounds, urgent medical care or emergency hospital treatment.
                              The insurance may be bought from an insurance company in the accredited list of local insurance companies, or an insurance company with office within the Schengen area. The insurance
                              must be valid for the entire Schengen area, and cover the duration of your stay. The minimum coverage shall be EUR 30.000. For the list of accredited travel insurance, click here
The possession of a visa does not give you an automatic right of entry to a Schengen country.
When you cross the border into the Schengen area, you will have to present: 
- your passport with the visa sticker
- proof that you have enough money to support yourself during your stay (e.g. cash or a credit card). If you have a guarantee form, you should also bring a copy of this with you.
- documentation showing the purpose of your visit, such as an invitation, hotel reservation, etc.
- a return or round trip ticket if you are visiting the Schengen area for tourist purposes or private reasons
